name: DragonFly - Watering Hole Sources
description: Detects access to URLs associated with watering hole attacks attributed to the DragonFly APT group. This rule identifies access to URLs containing specific strings ("script*iframe*", "dwd", "dwe", "fnd", "fne") from any source address.

prompts.prompt: Access to a URL associated with DragonFly APT group's watering hole attacks detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **User** {user}, **URL** {url}, **HTTP Method** {http_method}. Investigate this high-risk activity immediately for signs of compromise by the DragonFly APT group.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the web access event.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address accessing the URL.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user accessing the URL, if available.

parameters.name: http_method
parameters.description: The HTTP method used (GET, POST, etc.).
